title: WASH Program — Borehole Rehabilitation
caption: Community members celebrate the inauguration of a rehabilitated borehole in Dikwa, Borno State.

title: Nutrition Screening — Maiduguri
caption: CBI nutrition team conducts mass screening for acute malnutrition at a community outreach point.

title: Education — Gongonlong Primary School
caption: Children receive school supplies and hygiene kits at the reopening of Gongonlong Primary School.

title: Health Outreach — Adamawa State
caption: CBI health workers provide free medical consultations and essential medicines to displaced families.

title: GBV Awareness Campaign
caption: Community dialogue session on gender-based violence prevention and response in Yobe State.

title: Livelihoods Training — Potiskum
caption: Women beneficiaries complete a vocational skills training under CBI's food security and livelihoods program.

title: Partners Conference 2023
caption: CBI hosts its annual partners conference in Abuja, bringing together 40+ organizations.

title: Community Health Worker Graduation
caption: 50 newly trained community health workers receive certificates at the end of a 5-day training program.
